_doc: Per-provider OAuth client credentials. Copy this file to OAuthClients.json (gitignored) and fill in the values from each provider's developer console. Read at runtime by OAuthClientConfig. Per RFC 8252 / PKCE these values are semi-public for desktop apps — refresh tokens are the actually-sensitive bit and live in the macOS keychain. See docs/dropbox-registration.md, docs/google-drive-registration.md, docs/microsoft-onedrive-registration.md.

gdrive._scope_kind_doc: drive = full Drive (restricted; needs verification + CASA). drive_file = sandboxed (no verification). Defaults to drive when omitted.
